{{Quote|I just got word from one of my people on Bothawui who was tracking down one of Lord Graemon's connections there. He says there's been a bad riot over at the Combined Clans Building in Drev'starn, apparently over this Caamas Document thing.|[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Dreyf]], to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past" />}}
The '''Combined Clans Center Building''', simply referred to as the '''Combined Clans Building''', was a building in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Drev'starn]] that housed the heads of the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Combined Bothan Clans|Combined Clans]]. The building served as the governing center for the [[Clan|Bothan clans]] that controlled legislature throughout [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]]. During the [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] [[Caamas Document Crisis]]—brought about by the discovery of a [[Caamas Document|document]] that implicated the involvement of Bothans in the [[Caamas Firestorm|destruction of Caamas]]—the center was host to a devastating [[Combined Clans Center Building riot|riot]] incited by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] just prior to a [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|clash]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Description==
The Combined Clans Center Building, located near [[Merchant's Square]] in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Drev'starn]], consisted of a three-story atrium, with the top two floors hosting wide observation galleries facing the building's front. The atrium filled the front third of the building and contained doors leading to the outside. An ornamental stairway ran between the first two floors, yet only a standard stairway connected the top two floors. Public offices lined the perimeter of the atrium, and more private offices filled the second and third floors, which were decorated with [[borscii vine]]s, [[kafvris vine]]s, short [[Tree/Legends|trees]], and outdoor balconies.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

The records room of the building, marked "ARCHIVES," was located on the third floor. Security for the building included two armed guards at the base of the stairs and built-in, camouflaged [[static barrier pole]]s in the staircase banisters. During the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] riot<ref name="Specter of the Past" /> of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="Essential Reader's Companion" /> more armed guards were posted at the stairway.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

==History==
{{Quote|We desperately need your assistance. There is a mob moving on this building.|First Secretary Orou'cya, to [[New Republic High Council]]or Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="Specter of the Past" />}}
Following the Bothan implication in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Caamas Firestorm|destruction]] of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] after the [[Caamas Document]] came to light<ref name="Specter of the Past" /> in 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="Essential Reader's Companion" /> members of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] sought restitution from Bothawui. As [[Borsk Fey'lya]]—[[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] [[Senator/Legends|representative]] to Bothawui—claimed the Bothans did not have sufficient funds to aid in the relocation of [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] citizens, [[President of the Senate|President]] [[Ponc Gavrisom]] sent [[High Councilor]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] to the Combined Clans Center Building on Bothawui in order to examine the financial records of the [[Combined Bothan Clans|Bothan Combined Clans]], the governing body of the [[Clan|Bothan clans]].<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

Concurrent with Councilor Solo's trip to Bothawui with her [[Han Solo/Legends|husband]] and [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]], an [[Sinister Triumvirate|Imperial faction]] organized by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]], hoping to capitalize on the civil unrest stirred up by the recently-discovered Caamas Document, sent a [[Vengeance (organization)|team]] led by [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent [[Drend Navett]] to the city of Drev'starn. The Intelligence agents laid plans to foment a [[Combined Clans Center Building riot|riot]] in Merchant's Square, outside the building. [[Klif]], a member of Navett's team, pulled together a large, mixed crowd, including several [[Leresai]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] known for their harsh justice system, and [[Froffli]], a species whose government adamantly demanded sanctions against the Bothans.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

As the angry crowd stormed toward the building, [[Clan Askar|Askar]] [[Clan leader]] [[Rayl'skar]] appealed to the citizens for calm from a balcony of the Combined Clans Building. Before he could appease the unruly mob, well-placed [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]] shots appearing to originate both from Rayl'skar on the second floor, and Han Solo—scouting out the situation from the building's third-floor balcony—set off the bedlam. Although visibly emanating on a trajectory derived from the building, the initially invisible [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts in fact came from [[Nightstinger sporting blaster rifle|Xerrol Nightstinger blaster rifles]], fired by Drend Navett and his agents. The bolts in turn were redirected through multifaceted [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] and [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] gas-filled blast tubes placed on the balconies, designed to aim the shots at the crowd.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

When the crowd broke into the atrium of the Combined Clans Center Building, Leia Organa Solo answered [[First Secretary]] [[Ceok Orou'cya|Orou'cya's]] pleas for help and attempted to stop the rioters before more violence could occur. However, Bothan guards fired shots into the crowd that resulted in the destruction of the entire first floor. Han Solo was forced to cut through the ceremonial staircase linking the first two floors with his wife's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], in order to prevent the mob from gaining access to the upper levels. As a result of the tumultuous uproar, approximately forty individuals were injured, and twenty-seven additional rioters were killed. The [[Death/Legends|deaths]] included two Leresai, and the species was quick to join the ranks of governments demanding justice against the Bothans.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Combined Clans Center Building first appeared in the late 1990s ''[[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology]]'' by acclaimed science fiction author [[Timothy Zahn]], where it served as the focal point for a devastating riot in ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' ([[1997]]). It later garnered a few brief mentions in the second book of the same two-part series, ''[[Vision of the Future]]'' ([[1998]]).
